demonstrated_capabilities: Run deterministic, local opportunity and portfolio simulations
Accept the versioned DALEOBANKS OpportunityPacket compatibility contract
Render local database records and explicitly labeled offline fixtures
Validate the normative UAT artifacts through repository tests
limitations: No venture has been proven through paid, repeatable operation by this repository
No model or heuristic is calibrated to predict venture failure probability
Financial, market, compliance, agent-performance, and risk values may be seed data or operator inputs and are not independently audited
Authentication is suitable only for local demonstration and is not an enterprise identity control plane
Agent contracts, evidence gates, budgets, approvals, isolation, audit, and kill switches are specified but not yet enforced as a complete runtime
No output authorizes spending, contracting, publication, production deployment, hiring, legal representation, or another irreversible action
prohibited_claims: empirical failure probability derived from a heuristic score
legal or regulatory compliance without qualified review and evidence
production-grade, secure, autonomous, or enterprise-ready operation before the relevant acceptance gate clears
